prompt: I'm reviewing a title for a leasehold property purchase. The lease has 72 years remaining and there's a loft conversion without building regulations sign-off. What does the lender's handbook say?
expected_output: Specific Part 1 guidance on lease length requirements and building regulations, with section references

assertions.text: Response cites specific Handbook Part 1 section numbers (5.14 for leasehold, 5.5 for building regs)
Response mentions Part 2 lender-specific requirements for lease length
Response discusses building regulations enforcement period (4-year/10-year thresholds)
Response mentions indemnity insurance as potential resolution for building regs
Response does NOT just give generic advice — provides handbook-specific guidance
